projects.title: Pink Data Insights
projects.description: Sales data analysis project using Python (Pandas) and SQL (SQLite), including exploratory data analysis (EDA), revenue aggregation, and business insights.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Interactive front-end portfolio built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring dynamic content rendering via structured JSON.

insights: Product A is the primary revenue driver, representing nearly 50% of total sales.
The North region leads overall revenue performance.
Product C underperforms compared to other products.
SQL aggregation enables efficient multi-dimensional analysis across regions and products.
